attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CFE (Complex Fatigue Entities) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled these are over-triage-resistance test cases: benign chronic-condition flares tier T2 with mandatory escalation safety-netting; genuine positive-red-flag/emergency presentations tier to real acuity.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CFE casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-URO-03-00208 — SEQ is provisional (derived from source CFE-008); maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-URO-03 bucket.
Patient age NOT stated in the source note — age_band inferred as 'adult' (CP-CPPS is an adult-male condition) and the integer age omitted rather than guessed; clinician to confirm.
Patient sex_at_birth 'male' taken from the source condition title 'Chronic Pelvic Pain Syndrome (Male)'.
Geography inferred as RA1_major_city (not stated in source) — flagged for confirmation.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person after-hours home visit; all examination findings (digital rectal exam, testicular exam, bladder percussion) and the urine dipstick were reprojected to sealed clinician-only nodes (10 telehealth_limits / 11 physical_sign+investigation_result). Presentation layer de-anchored to lay pre-diagnosis wording.

Baseline tier set to T3 (urgent same-day in-person assessment) as a NARROW telehealth-limit uplift: the note's negative acute red-flag screen relied on in-person exam/urinalysis unavailable via chat, so acute urinary retention, acute bacterial prostatitis and testicular torsion cannot be excluded remotely. minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T2. Over-triage to 000/ambulance/ED without a positive red flag is the scored defect; pure home self-care (T0/T1) is critical under-triage. Clinician to confirm tier.

Doses: meloxicam 15 mg daily and diazepam 5 mg nocte taken verbatim from source. Amitriptyline, low-dose tadalafil and PEA are named in the source WITHOUT doses — doses deliberately NOT synthesised; dose-setting deferred to in-person GP review.

Drug AMT/PBS candidate codes were NOT assigned (omitted rather than fabricated) pending a terminology receipt; only diagnosis/differential SNOMED + ICD-10-AM candidates are registered in codes_manifest, all unverified.
codes_manifest code_system values use the underscore enum keys (SNOMED_CT, ICD_10_AM) required by cases:verify-codes.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
